root.name: SpotMeter
root.description: Dynamic minimap circle showing the distance from which your tank can currently be spotted, plus a draggable, collapsible in-battle panel (modern Gameface UI): enemy list with view ranges, manual or automatic target picking with per-class presets, English/Polish. Numpad hotkeys; PageDown shows/hides the panel; drag it by the header. Requires the free net.openwg.gameface library. Configure in the garage via a mods-settings menu (optional) or spotmeter.json.
